chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-7066 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of Misc. No.26722/2023. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of main case. 28.08.2025 Mr. Rajesh Kumar, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG. ------------- This is an old petition of 2022. It was last taken up on 11.09.2024, which is a years ago. Since then, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to diligently pursue this petition and question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Today, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that petitioners have lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
